name: intent-refinement
description: Draft, validate, and refine product intent and plan specifications using Narrative-Driven Development (NDD)

slashCommands.name: /refine-intent
slashCommands.description: Draft, validate, or refine a product intent specification using Narrative-Driven Development (NDD)
slashCommands.prompt: Help me draft, validate, or refine my product intent specification using Narrative-Driven Development (NDD). Please review my current goals or spec, structure them into Domain -> Narrative -> Scene -> Moment, ensure moments are typed (Command/Query/React/Experience), check for business rules and Given/When/Then examples, and verify cohesion (Data Completeness and Read/Write balance).
